risks.summary: symptom-first branching has limited eligible paths on 5/6 products
escalation cannot fire 'mandatory-warning surface' on 2 products
confidence-aware guidance currently relies on heuristic mapping; per-node confidence not yet emitted by knowledge-core
degraded-mode substitution cannot resolve targets without a registered fallback list per procedure
context dimensions are modelled here but no upstream emitter populates them yet
ambiguous-intent branch is contractual; no live detector
user-role assumed declared; inference path not modelled here by design
cross-product collisions block uniform adaptation across the family
rare overlapping triggers may produce ambiguous order; precedence rules cover declared cases
